directionFrames.currentPosition: predictedPosition - currentCursorPosition projected on recent runtime motion direction
directionFrames.offset0Direction: prediction error to candidate target projected on offset0 target direction
directionFrames.candidateTargetDirection: prediction error to candidate target projected on candidate shifted target direction

acuteStopSlices.fastThenNearZero: v12 >= 500 px/s and offset0 target speed <= 150 px/s
acuteStopSlices.stopAfterHighSpeed: v12 >= 1500 px/s and offset0 target speed <= 150 px/s
acuteStopSlices.postStopFirstFrames: v12 >= 500 px/s and v5 <= 250 px/s and v2 <= 100 px/s

sideEffectSlices.normalMove: not acute stop and 250 <= v12 < 1800 px/s
sideEffectSlices.staticHold: v12 <= 100 px/s and offset0 target speed <= 25 px/s
